title: inspect: do not show <nil> as gateway
body:
When a network is created without gateway, i.e. --internal --disable-dns then the gateway will be nil. But converting a nil ip to string produces "<nil>" which is not what we want as we like an empty string there to signal that the network has no gateway.

Fixes: #28705

```release-note
Fixed an issue where networks without a gateway showed "<nil>" as gateway string instead of an empty string in inspect.
```
